headlines.title: Nashville Zoo tries to halt data center project next door over animal safety concerns
headlines.description: The zoo this week launched an online petition against the data center that, as of Friday, had more than 180,000 signatures and 25,000 shares on Facebook.

headlines.title: Utah residents sue officials over Kevin O’Leary data center plan
headlines.description: A nonprofit and five Utah residents have filed a lawsuit against officials and a special entity overseeing Kevin O’Leary’s planned Stratos data center.

headlines.title: Bot web traffic has overtaken human web traffic, data shows
headlines.description: Cloudflare says 57.4% of requests to a selection of websites it hosts are now automated bot requests, while 42.6% are human-generated.

headlines.title: Illinois Gov. JB Pritzker to suspend tax breaks offered to data centers
headlines.description: Pritzker, who is widely viewed as having 2028 White House aspirations, is tapping into an issue seen as important to voters.

headlines.title: Trump signs order seeking early access to powerful AI models before release
headlines.description: The president signed an order seeking to establish a voluntary framework for AI companies to provide the government early access to new models.

headlines.title: Exclusive: Trump says Iran hasn't made a deal because ‘they’re strong’ and ‘proud’
headlines.description: President Trump sits down for an exclusive interview with Meet the Press as the U.S. looks to make a deal with Iran to end the war.

headlines.title: Pentagon raised threat of Israeli spying on U.S. to highest level, sources say
headlines.description: WASHINGTON — The Pentagon is increasingly concerned about Israel ramping up its spying on the U.S., recently raising the counterintelligence threat level from America’s top ally in the Middle East to the highest level, according to two U.S. officials and one former U.S. official

headlines.title: Democrat Xavier Becerra advances to California governor general election, NBC News projects
headlines.description: Former Health and Human Services Secretary Xavier Beccera will advance to the general election in the race for governor in California, NBC News projects. NBC News’ Liz Kreutz discuss the latest election results and what impacts the speed of vote counting in the state.

headlines.title: How the FBI and law enforcement plan to deploy drones to keep FIFA World Cup games safe
headlines.description: The FBI prepares to tackle drone security ahead of FIFA World Cup games spanning across the country. NBC News' Kelly O’Donnell goes behind the scenes with the FBI to see how its own drones and partnerships with local law enforcement will keep the events safe.

headlines.title: Anthropic Warns AI May Soon Be Able to Improve Itself
headlines.description: Artificial intelligence company Anthropic is calling for a global slowdown of AI development, saying the systems are advancing so fast, they may soon be able to improve themselves without any human input. Anthropic co-founder Jack Clark says it’s important that people keep control over AI systems as they get more powerful and have a broader impact on society.

headlines.title: Startup aims to launch data centers to space
headlines.description: NBC News, Gadi Schwartz talks to CEO of Cowboy Space Corp. Baiju Bhatt about his startup and his hopes for launching an AI data center on a rocket.

headlines.title: Telecommunications companies are adapting to natural disasters by investing in new tech
headlines.description: This hurricane season is expected to be relatively calm, but the U.S. could still see a major storm. NBC News' Gary Grumbach takes a look at how some telecommunications companies are utilizing new technology to better respond to natural disasters.
